title: aeluropus littoralis subsp. repens
intro: Aeluropus littoralis subsp. repens, also known as Sea Couch or Beach Grass, is a type of coastal grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Aeluropus littoralis subsp. repens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
